tables.description: The dataset contains data of n=213 variables querying for other than cardiac diagnoses, including e.g. presence/absence of chromosomal abnormalities, endocrinological, immunological, neurological, skeletal or other abnormalities, plus age and ID variables. In study version 3, one variable has been added: LATEST_EXAM_AGE, two variables have been removed: EXAM_AGES; NUMBER_OF_EXAMS).

variables.name: DGS_VCFS_CTAF
variables.description: Di George Syndrome/Velocardiofacial Syndrome/Conotruncal Anomaly Face Syndrome

tables.description: The dataset contains data of n=35 variables that describe cardiovascular health status of participants plus age and (de-identified) subject ID. Specifically, the variables query for availability of ECG or MRI data, and presence of cardiac abnormalities (e.g. conotruncal lesion, tricuspid valve abnormality, etc.).

The dataset contains data of n=32 variables that describe cardiovascular health status of participants plus age and (de-identified) subject ID. Specifically, the variables query for e.g. presence/absence of arrhythmia, pacemaker, cardiac transplant, etc.

variables.name: EXTRACORPOREAL_MEMBRANE_OXYGENATION_UNABLE_TO_WEEN_FROM_BYPASS
variables.description: Extracorporeal membrane oxygenation unable to ween from bypass

tables.description: The dataset provides information about the type of genetic testing performed.

variables.name: AGE_AT_GENETIC_TESTING_FORM_COMPLETION
variables.description: Age at genetic testing form completion

tables.description: The dataset provides information about e.g. ethnicity, race, education, presence/absence of structural heart disease in mothers of  participants.
The dataset provides information about microarray results, including chromosomal location of variants, starting/ending base pairs, and their presence in parents.
The dataset provides information about e.g. ethnicity, race, education, presence/absence of structural heart disease in fathers of participants.
The dataset provides information about e.g. participants' ethnicity, race, interview language (including, if a translator was used), and reported cosanguinity.
The dataset contains mutation testing results, including presence/absence of variants in parents.

variables.name: PATHOGENIC_MUTATION_OR_UNKNOWN_SIG_VARIANT
variables.description: Pathogenic mutation or unknown significant variant

tables.description: The dataset provides copy number variation results, including abnormalities present/absent in parents.
The dataset describes other genetic tests performed (n=4 variables) and presence/absence of identified abnormality in parents.

variables.name: SOURCE_OF_OTHER_GENETIC_TEST_INFORMATION
variables.description: Source of other genetic test information

tables.description: Genotype File Information (e.g. ID - Platform Mapping)

variables.name: DATA_TYPE
variables.description: A high-level description of the type of data in the file

variables.name: GENOME
variables.description: The genome build of the probeset

variables.name: PLATFORM
variables.description: Platform used to generate the data

tables.description: The dataset provides information about Fluorescent In Situ Hybridization results obtained from samples of participants and parents.
Subject - Consent - Affection Status Information (Data of n=2985 subjects have been added in study version 3.)

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.description: Subject ID used at the Source Repository

tables.description: Pedigree Information
Subject - Sample Mapping

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Subject's sample use. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Seq_DNA_Exome_Target: Targeted exome sequencing; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_DNA_WholeGenome: Whole genome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: The dataset contains information about chromosomal abnormalities (chromosom number, sex chromosome).
Sample - Attribute Information

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

tables.description: The dataset privides information about type of catherization (e.g. stent, balloon) and age at which the procedure was performed.
The dataset contains data about karyotype abnormalities in participants.
The dataset contains information about participants' diagnosis.
